title: Add --all-tags to push
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds the --all-tags to the push command to emulate the one in
the pull command.   Addresses https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2369
on the Buildah side, once approved similar changes will be made to Podman.

comments.body: Repushed, @mheon FYI, planning to add to Podman once approved here.

I've not been since @mtrmac's comments.  He brought up a lot of good points and I'm not sure if we should go forward with this or not.  I've been mulling it over, but paying attention to other things.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 4c6b09c) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I think yes.  @mtrmac comments pointed out a number of issues that I'd not considered.  I'll close and will let him reopen if he disagrees.
